title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
